problem id: fd2c352d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  00110001 -> 00010000
  10000011 -> 00110001
  11101001 -> 10010001
  01000010 -> 00100000
  00101010 -> 10100000
  11110000 -> 00000001
  01010101 -> 01010000
  10101101 -> 11010001
  01000100 -> 01000000

query: 11110101
predicted answer: 01010001
